# task-title

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Haiku-backed task title generation. Synthesises an instant first-line fallback; upgrades asynchronously so task creation never blocks on the Claude CLI round-trip.
- Exports (server):
  - Values: `generateTaskTitle`, `scheduleTaskTitleUpdate`, `synthesiseTitleFallback`
- Server:
  - Uses: `tasks-core.updateTaskTitle`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
